conversation.text: Hello. I'm new to this app. My name is Carol. I have $3,120 in my account right now, I think. Should I start by telling you about my bills?

Got it — $3,120.00. 👍

When's your next paycheck? A date like *"the 15th"* or *"April 30"*, or *"skip"* if it's irregular.
Oh, I get paid on the 1st and the 15th. So twice a month. Is that what you meant?

All set ✅ — $3,120.00, payday 2026-06-01.

From here just talk to me: "spent 20 on coffee", "rent 1400 due the 1st", "can I afford 200?" — I'll handle it.

🟢 *Calm* — $100.64/day, 31 days to payday.
Updating to twice monthly — the 1st and 15th. Got it!

Payday → 2026-06-01 (biweekly)  [buttons: Yes / Cancel]
(tapped: Yes)

Adding mortgage — $1,450 monthly on the 1st. Go ahead and rattle off the rest whenever; I can handle them all at once or one by one.

Separate — I'll log it as its own bill. So mortgage $1,450 + property tax escrow $380, both due the 1st. Keep 'em coming!
